title: useReactTable with Filtering, Sorting, Pagination
description: Core setup of useReactTable hook with column filters, sorting, and pagination row models.
content:
# useReactTable Setup

Core hook initialization with filtering, sorting, and pagination.

```typescript
import {
  ColumnFiltersState,
  flexRender,
  getCoreRowModel,
  getFilteredRowModel,
  getPaginationRowModel,
  getSortedRowModel,
  useReactTable,
} from '@tanstack/react-table';

const [columnFilters, setColumnFilters] = React.useState<ColumnFiltersState>([]);
const [data, setData] = React.useState<Person[]>(() => makeData(5000));

const table = useReactTable({
  data,
  columns,
  filterFns: {},
  state: { columnFilters },
  onColumnFiltersChange: setColumnFilters,
  getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
  getFilteredRowModel: getFilteredRowModel(),
  getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
  getPaginationRowModel: getPaginationRowModel(),
});
```

Row models: getCoreRowModel (required), getFilteredRowModel, getSortedRowModel, getPaginationRowModel, getGroupedRowModel, getExpandedRowModel.

**Category:** Core
**URL:** https://tanstack.com/table/latest/docs/framework/react/examples/filters

title: Column Definitions
description: Defining columns with accessorKey, accessorFn, cell renderers, headers, and filter variants.

title: Rendering Table with flexRender
description: Using flexRender to render headers, cells, and footers from the table instance.

title: Pagination State Management
description: Managing pagination state with setPagination and PaginationState type.
content: # Pagination Manage pagination with React state. ```tsx const [pagination, setPagination] = React.useState({ pageIndex: 0, pageSize: 10, }); const table = useReactTable({ columns, data, getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(), getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(), getFilteredRowModel: getFilteredRowModel(), getPaginationRowModel: getPaginationRowModel(), onPaginationChange: setPagination, state: { pagination }, }); ``` Pagination controls: ```tsx Page {table.getState().pagination.pageIndex + 1} of {table.getPageCount()} ``` **Category:** Features **URL:** https://tanstack.com/table/latest/docs/framework/react/examples/pagination

title: Global Filter and Fuzzy Search
description: Implementing global filter with fuzzy matching across all columns.
content:
# Global Filter and Fuzzy Search

```tsx
const [globalFilter, setGlobalFilter] = React.useState('');

const table = useReactTable({
  data,
  columns,
  filterFns: { fuzzy: fuzzyFilter },
  state: { columnFilters, globalFilter },
  onColumnFiltersChange: setColumnFilters,
  onGlobalFilterChange: setGlobalFilter,
  globalFilterFn: 'fuzzy',
  getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
  getFilteredRowModel: getFilteredRowModel(),
  getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
  getPaginationRowModel: getPaginationRowModel(),
});
```

Built-in filterFns: 'includesString', 'includesStringSensitive', 'equalsString', 'arrIncludes', 'arrIncludesAll', 'arrIncludesSome', 'equals', 'weakEquals', 'inNumberRange'.

Custom filterFn signature: `(row, columnId, filterValue, addMeta) => boolean`

**Category:** Features
**URL:** https://tanstack.com/table/latest/docs/framework/react/examples/filters-fuzzy

title: Column Resizing
description: Enable column resize with onChange or onEnd modes and resize handlers.
content:
# Column Resizing

```tsx
const table = useReactTable({columnResizeMode: 'onChange'});
// In header
<div onDoubleClick={() => header.column.resetSize()} onMouseDown={header.getResizeHandler()} onTouchStart={header.getResizeHandler()} className={`resizer ${header.column.getIsResizing() ? 'isResizing' : ''}`} />
```
columnResizeMode options: 'onChange' (immediate feedback) or 'onEnd' (resize on drop). Use header.getResizeHandler() for mouse/touch events. header.column.resetSize() restores default.

title: Virtualized Infinite Scrolling
description: Combining TanStack Table with React Query and React Virtual for infinite data loading.

title: Manual Server-Side Pagination and Sorting
description: Configuring table for server-side data with manual pagination and sorting.
content:
# Manual Server-Side Features

```typescript
const table = useReactTable({
  data, columns,
  manualPagination: true,    // server handles pagination
  manualSorting: true,       // server handles sorting
  manualFiltering: true,     // server handles filtering
  pageCount: serverPageCount, // total pages from server
  state: {pagination, sorting, globalFilter},
  onPaginationChange: setPagination,
  onSortingChange: setSorting,
  getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
});
```
When manual* options are true, the table disables built-in processing and assumes data is already processed by the server.
